title: pulicaria alata
intro: Pulicaria alata, also known as Egyptian fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pulicaria alata include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pulicaria alata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
